\tzpentry{ID11381}{S3 Hypersphere Volume}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
A 3-sphere of radius R has spatial volume two pi squared R cubed.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
V_{S^{3}}=2\pi^{2}R^{3}
